assertionResults.fullName: Theme Context and Toggle Integration initializes with default light theme when no system preference or saved preference
assertionResults.title: initializes with default light theme when no system preference or saved preference

assertionResults.fullName: Theme Context and Toggle Integration changes theme when clicking the different theme toggle buttons
assertionResults.title: changes theme when clicking the different theme toggle buttons

assertionResults.fullName: Theme Context and Toggle Integration toggles theme cyclically using CompactThemeToggle
assertionResults.title: toggles theme cyclically using CompactThemeToggle

assertionResults.fullName: Theme Context and Toggle Integration reacts to keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Shift+T to cycle theme
assertionResults.title: reacts to keyboard shortcut Ctrl+Shift+T to cycle theme

assertionResults.fullName: SearchBar Integration with useSearch renders the search bar when isOpen is true
assertionResults.title: renders the search bar when isOpen is true

assertionResults.fullName: SearchBar Integration with useSearch does not render when isOpen is false
assertionResults.title: does not render when isOpen is false

assertionResults.fullName: SearchBar Integration with useSearch filters results correctly based on debounced search query
assertionResults.title: filters results correctly based on debounced search query

assertionResults.fullName: SearchBar Integration with useSearch allows clearing the query using the clear button
assertionResults.title: allows clearing the query using the clear button
